questions.prompt: Data from an IoT device is transferred to cloud via a network, which is then processed at the cloud and then a response is sent back to the IoT device from the cloud after processing. questions.prompt: Data from an IoT device is transferred to cloud via a network, which is then processed at the cloud and then a response is sent back to the IoT device from the cloud after processing. questions.solution:
Time taken for one-way data transfer between the node and cloud is 10s. Total time
taken for the data transfer is 25s. So 25=10+x+10 (transfer from node to cloud+processing at
cloud+transfer from cloud to node). Thus x=5s.
